contingency_purpose: Contingency: serve static/read-only Z-Bridge or dashboard mirrors when local SSWS is unreachable.
Soft launch: preview hosting per MONOREPO_GUIDE Task 008 without binding hub governance to Cloudflare production semantics.

precaution_themes.summary: Never commit Cloudflare API tokens, Account ID in tracked files, or Wrangler secrets. Use dashboard Secrets and local untracked env.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: Release gate and vault policy outrank edge deploy convenience.

precaution_themes.summary: Cloudflare Ask AI is for navigation and how-to only — not a source of binding governance.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: Same as MONOREPO_GUIDE Phase 7; cross-check Z_SANCTUARY_SECURITY_POLICY.

precaution_themes.summary: Read-only API tokens for dashboard agents (e.g. Agent Lee style prompts): minimum scope; review quarterly.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: Z-Bridge logs must not echo tokens; revoke on leak.

precaution_themes.summary: Workers AI / Vectorize / R2 / KV: adopt only with a designed use case in Master Register — not required for hub core.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: Comms flows stay manifest- and file-driven until architecture approves edge AI data paths.

precaution_themes.summary: Cloudflare is contingency + soft launch — restores read-only visibility; does not replace Cursor, registry, or Folder Manager authority.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: z_cloudflare_ai_comms_manifest.json timestamps document propagation through toolchain.
